name: Turkey or Chicken Tetrazzini I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 1 cup light cream or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet and add mushrooms, cooking for 2 minutes.
2. Add flour, broth, cream, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Cook over low heat, stirring until thickened.
3. Pour the mushroom-curry mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
4. In a large bowl, mix turkey and chicken with pasta.
5. Combine half of the cheese in the meat and pasta mixture.
6. Add the cheese mixture to the casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
8. Bake in a 400°F oven for 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Can be made in advance and frozen. Yield: 8 servings.
